heading: Thursday Night
text: Variable clouds. Scattered evening thunderstorms north of Route 2, isolated elsewhere; any storms could again be severe. Lows from the upper 60s to mid 70s. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph early, then diminishing.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Slight chance of a shower or thunderstorm. Highs from the upper 80s to mid 90s. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, and gusting to 15 mph, becoming west in the afternoon.

heading: Friday Night
text: Variable clouds. A rising chance of showers north, and from the southern Greens westward, chance late southeast; a thunderstorm possible. Lows from the mid 60s to lower 70s. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.
